system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi there! I’d like some help with a couple of exchanges, please.

First, I want to exchange my skateboard for a shorter one made from bamboo. If you have several options, could you tell me all the choices and their prices? I’d like to go with the most expensive one—I figure that means it’s probably the best quality.

Second, I received a garden hose, but it’s not the one I wanted. I’d like to exchange it for the type that’s in my pending order. Can you check my pending order and make sure it’s the same one? I don’t want to cancel anything, just swap out the hose.

Let me know what info you need from me!

I’d be happy to help with your exchanges! To get started, I’ll need to verify your identity. Could you please provide either:

- The email address associated with your account,  
**or**
- Your first name, last name, and zip code?

Once I’ve verified your account, I’ll look up your skateboard and garden hose orders, show you the available bamboo skateboard options and prices, and check your pending order for the correct garden hose type.

Sure thing! My name is Isabella Johansson, and my zip code is 32286. I don’t remember my email address off the top of my head, but hopefully my name and zip code work.

Let me know if you need anything else!

Thank you for providing your name and zip code. I’ll use this information to locate your account. Please hold on for a moment while I look up your details.

If I need any additional information, I’ll let you know right away.
Sounds good, thanks! I’ll hang tight while you check. Just let me know if you need anything else from me.

I'm having trouble accessing your account with the information provided. To assist you further, could you please double-check your zip code or provide the email address associated with your account if you remember it? This will help me verify your identity and proceed with your exchange requests. Thank you!

Hmm, I’m pretty sure my zip code is 32286 and my name is Isabella Johansson. Unfortunately, I really don’t remember my email address right now. Is there any other way you can look me up—maybe with my phone number or order number? If not, maybe you can try searching again with the info I gave you? Let me know what works!

Thank you for confirming your details. At this time, I can only look up your account using your email address or your first name, last name, and zip code. Unfortunately, I’m unable to search by phone number or order number.

I will try searching again with your name and zip code. If it still doesn’t work, you may need to provide your email address or contact a human agent for further assistance.

Please hold on while I attempt the search again.

arguments.summary: User Isabella Johansson (zip code 32286) is unable to recall her email address and cannot be authenticated via name and zip code due to a technical error. She needs help with exchanging a skateboard for a shorter bamboo model (wants to see all options and prices), and exchanging a delivered garden hose for the type in her pending order. She does not want to cancel any orders.

messages.content:
I'm currently unable to access your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. Since I can't authenticate you with the available methods, I recommend contacting a human agent who can assist you further and may have additional ways to verify your identity.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for help with your exchanges?
Yeah, that sounds good. Please transfer me to a human agent so I can get these exchanges sorted out. Thanks for your help!
YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
